$comment: Global runner config. Per-step overrides live in the steps file. The base URL is prepended to any relative `navigate` path in a step.

ruffle.$comment: How to find Ruffle's canvas. Playwright CSS pierces open shadow roots, so a bare `canvas` selector reaches inside whichever Ruffle wrapper holds it (<ruffle-player> from createPlayer(), or <ruffle-object>/<ruffle-embed> from the <object>/<embed> polyfill — the homepage uses the latter). Leave playerSelector empty to match either. canvasSize is the authored Flash stage size used to sanity-check readiness.

settle.$comment: Defaults for animation-settle gating. A step's wait block can override any of these.
